title: Jack Altman on Product-Market Fit
content: Jack Altman discusses product-market fit, customer feedback, hiring, and fundraising on Speedrun, drawing from his experience scaling Lattice to a multi-billion-dollar company. He covers how founders should evaluate customer requests, recognize when to pivot, and balance conviction with market feedback. Topics include early-stage challenges like building a sales motion, hiring first employees, scaling tradeoffs, co-founder dynamics, startup momentum, and his current investment criteria at Alt Capital.

title: 在大疆、影石夹缝中做智能影像生意，这家公司连续五年每年增长50%｜硬氪专访
content:
作者 | 黄楠 编辑 | 袁斯来

在创业者中，OBSBOT寻影CEO刘博已经是个“老人”了。

2016年，刘博浙大毕业就到深圳创业。不管是当初还是现在，在高调的“天才少年”创业者中，刘博履历都算不上特别耀眼。

他没有太多感性的故事分享。唯一一段难忘的经历…

title: 又是梁文锋，有点猛啊。
content: Liang Wenfeng, born in 1985 in Guangdong to teacher parents, showed early academic talent, especially in mathematics. He scored 806 on the 2002 gaokao, becoming his region's top scorer, and chose Zhejiang University over Tsinghua for its electronics program. After earning a master's in computer vision in 2010, he pursued quantitative finance, co-founding Jacobi Investment in 2013 and幻方量化 in 2015. The firm achieved AI-driven trading and managed over 100 billion RMB by 2021. In 2023, Liang founded DeepSeek to pursue artificial general intelligence, gaining global recognition for cost-efficient, open-source large language models that challenged tech monopolies.

title: Anthropic 将与特朗普政府就 Mythos 模型争议举行会谈
content: Anthropic is meeting Trump administration officials to resolve a dispute over AI models Fable5 and Mythos5. The company received an export control order Friday citing national security powers, forcing suspension of foreign access to both models. Tensions had already escalated when the Pentagon labeled Anthropic a "supply chain risk" in March, banning defense contractors from using its technology; Anthropic is suing over this. The government requested model disabling Friday afternoon with little prior warning, despite earlier agency cooperation and deployment approval. Anthropic views the conflict as a misunderstanding over potential jailbreak vulnerabilities and seeks to restore access quickly.
eventKey: anthropic-将与特朗普政府就-mythos-模型争议举行会谈
normalizedTitle: anthropic 将与特朗普政府就 mythos 模型争议举行会谈

title: Anthropic 遭用户起诉涉嫌夸大订阅使用额度
content: A consumer is suing Anthropic, seeking class-action status for subscribers since April. The lawsuit alleges the company misrepresented usage limits for its Max 5x and Max 20x subscription plans, claiming high-priced AI services delivered fewer usage credits than advertised. The complaint targets $200 monthly plans that reportedly proved insufficient for users despite their premium cost.

normalizedTitle: anthropic 遭用户起诉涉嫌夸大订阅使用额度
